rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Elec. Code §255.0031, which governs use of internal mail systems for political advertising. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: An officer or employee of a state agency or political subdivision may not knowingly use or authorize the use of an internal mail system for the distribution of political advertising.
_note: Rule text concerns political advertising via internal mail; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
